textByHash.400eb2cbda8d4d8b47beea2cbe13d8df972c20fa: Yeah? Well, your mother was a jackal!
textByHash.473e421b5fa8f8b8a474bf00fb5c691f026f8d74: Well, I have to say, I am pretty peckish, but thankfully, I don't eat humans... often.
textByHash.48966c187399393c76e306f347123b765297194e: You'll catch a stiff kick if you talk about me like that again!
textByHash.52aa0457e88783ee7d3587ee29dce2974a44fcbd: Well I can, so watch what you say in future.
textByHash.68357b5792c5ae00fee22c5c8a2c6e925b46fd55: I hope that's what you wanted!
textByHash.80a70d1b6036df68056201d335a242d83e9df460: How can you say such cruel things?
textByHash.81168a1558c80ade914e9e9827d2a8fc4e5e39d2: You and whose army mate? You and whose army?
textByHash.c07bced09b02baeb2689815708b062d6dd5f6ee4: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!
textByHash.f79c2444558dd009d4d4c5076b55226577941e8d: Hey! Be kinder to your four-legged neighbours.
